data.title: Radio Flyer Scoot 2 Scooter, Blue/Red/Pink, for Kids Ages 1-4, Ride On Toy or 4-Wheel Kids Scooter, Durable Wheels and Frame,

features: 2 RIDES IN 1: The Scoot 2 Scooter grows with your child. Start in ride-on mode for seated scooting
then flip the base to convert into a 4-wheel scooter when they're ready - no tools required. Great for backyard
STABLE AND DURABLE: Built with a sturdy frame and a 4-wheel base
this scooter for toddlers provides extra stability for beginner riders. Kids build balance and confidence while parents enjoy lasting quality that provides years of fun.
GREAT BEGINNER RIDE: Designed for toddlers ages 1-4
this versatile scooter is the perfect first ride-on and scooter combo
providing active play and an easy transition from seated scooting to big-kid riding.
GROWS WITH YOUR CHILD: Adjustable handlebars and built-in toy storage in ride-on mode make this toddler scooter a fun
BELOVED ICON OF PLAY: For over a century
Radio Flyer has inspired joyful play with wagons
and more. As a Certified B Corp
we create lasting products that spark imagination while caring for future generations.
